zh.lifeSummary: Richard Bellhouse於1208年出生在英國英格蘭。他和Matilda Poucard至少有2個兒子。他去世在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Bellhouse于1208年出生在英国英格兰。他和Matilda Poucard至少有2个儿子。他去世在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Bellhouse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Middle English bel-hous ‘detached bell-house or belfry’ (Old English bell-hūs) or from a place so called, such as Bell House in Mytholmroyd and Bellhouses in Sheffield (both WR Yorks).

variants.name: Bellas
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a belltower, from Middle English bel-hous ‘detached bell-house or belfry’ (Old English bell-hūs). The surname is now found chiefly in Yorkshire and Westmorland.
Greek: Hellenized form of the Italian surname Bella , or alternatively a nickname derived from South Slavic bel ‘white’.
Galician: probably from the adjective belo, bela ‘beautiful, lovely’, possibly with topographic reference.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: Richard Bellhouse was born in 1208, in England, United Kingdom. He had at least 2 sons with Matilda Poucard. He died in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Bellhouse est né en 1208, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Matilda Poucard. Il est décédé à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Bellhouse wurde 1208 in England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hatte mit Matilda Poucard mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb in England.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Bellhouse è nato il nel 1208 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Matilda Poucard. Morì nel England.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Bellhouseは1208年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた。彼はMatilda Poucardとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼はイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Bellhouse(은)는 1208년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났다. 그는 Matilda Poucard(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 영국에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Bellhouse nasceu em 1208, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Matilda Poucard. Ele faleceu em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Bellhouse родился в 1208 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Matilda Poucard. Он умер в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Bellhouse nació en 1208, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Matilda Poucard. Murió en Inglaterra.
